sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Topics 146:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Topics 146:1
items.html: Because the posterior of the light of Keter that remained in the Rosh and did not return to the Guf deny illumination of GAR from the Partzuf. Hence, as long as its record shines by the force of its illumination in the vessel of Keter, it does not expand in Hochma and Bina, as they are from the phase of illumination of GAR. (Inner Light, Item‎ 40)
